code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut state = 0
mut num_str = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      if state == 3
        match string.parse_int(num_str)
        when Some(v)
          sum = sum + v
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      state = 0
      num_str = ""
    else if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
      if state == 1
        state = 2
      else if state == 3
        state = 4
      end
    else
      if state == 0
        state = 1
      else if state == 2
        state = 3
        num_str = "#{num_str}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      else if state == 3
        num_str = "#{num_str}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if state == 3
  match string.parse_int(num_str)
  when Some(v)
    sum = sum + v
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println("sum=#{sum}")
